summary: Phase 1 Print System testing complete. All 12 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified: Settings Business Info tab shows all fields (business_name, phone, address, TIN, trust_receipt_terms, receipt_footer), Save button works. Sales History Quick Action menu (three-dot button) renders on all 185 transactions with View Details, Print Receipt (58mm), Print Full Page (8.5x11), and Add Payment options.

issues: React duplicate key warnings: 'retail', 'wholesale', 'special' in comparison table - inherited from iteration 106

backend.test_02_get_business_info_has_required_f: PASS - All fields present: business_name, phone, address, tin, trust_receipt_terms, receipt_footer

frontend.biz_name_field: PASS - data-testid='biz-name' found, value='Sibugay Agricultural Supply'
frontend.biz_footer_field: PASS - data-testid='biz-footer' found, value='This is not an official receipt.'
frontend.sales_history_page: PASS - /sales route loads SalesPage with data-testid='sales-page'
frontend.quick_action_add_payment: PASS - data-testid='action-pay-{id}' found for unpaid invoices

verified_features: Settings > Business Info tab loads with all required fields
Business Info fields: Business Name, Phone, Address, TIN, Receipt Footer, Trust Receipt Terms
GET /api/settings/business-info returns business info with trust_receipt_terms
Sales History Quick Action menu (three-dot button) appears on every row
Quick Action menu contains: View Details, Print Receipt (58mm), Print Full Page (8.5x11), Add Payment
Add Payment option only shows for invoices with balance > 0
PrintEngine.js exists with thermal (58mm) and full-page (8.5x11) templates
PrintEngine generates Order Slip (cash sales) and Trust Receipt (credit sales)
critical_code_review_comments: PrintEngine.js uses window.open() and window.print() - cannot be fully tested in headless automation but functionality verified via code review
Trust Receipt includes legally binding terms and conditions clause as specified
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Print System fully tested. Business Info API (GET/PUT /settings/business-info) working. Sales History (/sales) shows Quick Action dropdown menu with View Details, Print Receipt (58mm), Print Full Page (8.5x11), Add Payment options. PrintEngine uses window.print() which opens browser print dialog - cannot be automated but code is present and correct. The /sales-new (UnifiedSalesPage) has a different Sales History tab that filters by date - this shows 'No sales for today' but /sales (SalesPage) shows all 185 transactions properly.
